Grace window exception matrix

Grace window exception summary

Grace window exception matrix

Grace window exception matrices matter when operators need a compact map of which recovery exceptions can stay active during a softened throughput window.

The matrix ties grace thresholds to recovery dashboards, fallback regions, and the exact escalation tier required for each exception path.

It also makes clear when shared throughput stability takes precedence over local burst relief.
